svg.title: EAIOS — how it works, end to end
svg.desc: Full walkthrough: landing, login, OS shell, document ingestion into RAG and knowledge graph, the ask flow through the agent graph and LLM layer, realtime and observability systems, automations, and the deployment pipeline.
svg.text: EAIOS — how it works, end to end
Enterprise AI Operating System · hybrid multimodal RAG · 9 cooperating agents · knowledge graph · automations · observability
① ENTER — from web page to operating system
Traces · SQL Studio · Analytics · Admin · Terminal · Settings
② ADD KNOWLEDGE — every upload becomes searchable intelligence

g.text: co-occurrence edges · explore in Graph app

svg.text: ③ ASK ANYTHING — the multi-agent answer flow
StateGraph orchestrator (LangGraph semantics · falls back to a simple sequential path if anything fails)
Document Agent detail: hybrid search = BM25 + vector similarity, fused with Reciprocal Rank Fusion ➜ top-6 chunks with scores.
Relational questions ("how are X and Y related?") also pull a connection path + evidence from the knowledge graph.
Every step publishes agent.step events (live feed) and records a span (Traces).
LLM layer — auto-detects the best available provider, never fails
if a provider errors mid-demo ➜ mock answers, never a crash
citation chips with relevance meters · confidence % · plan chips showing which agents ran · code blocks with copy · read-aloud · stop / regenerate / export

g.text: presence avatars in the menu bar
live agent feed in Agents app

svg.text: ⑤ AUTOMATE — drag-and-drop workflows on the same agent runtime
⑥ SHIP IT — from laptop to the internet

g.text: seeds itself on boot · Groq Llama-3.1
Helm chart: K8s autoscaling 2➜10 pods · TLS · nightly backups

svg.text: Storage: SQLite (dev, WAL) / PostgreSQL (prod) — users · documents · chunks · conversations · entities · workflows · traces · audit · Vectors: Qdrant / in-memory
Every external dependency has a built-in fallback — the platform always boots, always answers, even fully offline in demo mode.
Try it: eaios.onrender.com · login admin@eaios.dev / admin12345 · ask "How many annual leave days do we get?"
B.E. Computer Engineering capstone · Darshan Dalvi · React 18 + TypeScript · FastAPI + SQLAlchemy · StateGraph agents · 2026
